title: parse_sse_block id return silently discarded in stream loop
description: In client.rs subscribe_events, the event id returned by parse_sse_block is discarded with _id. The doc comment on subscribe_events says callers should track last_event_id for reconnect (RFC 8620 §7.3), but there is no comment at the discard site explaining whether this is a known omission or a bug. A contributor seeing _id would not know whether to fix it or leave it. The discard site needs a comment: // id tracking deferred — caller must implement reconnect with last_event_id.
